title: Central High Sneaks
excerpt: It's the first month as a design team member for Studio Calico and I am pretty chuffed (an Australian term I have picked up) to show you a sneak at what I did with the Main kit, as well as…
body:
It's the first month as a design team member for Studio Calico and I am pretty chuffed (an Australian term I have picked up) to show you a sneak at what I did with the Main kit, as well as Add-On's #1, 2, and 4. 

September Studio Calico kit and Add-Ons available August 27th.
